description_long: This is a sleek, dark-colored coupe car with a sporty, aerodynamic design and a prominent rear spoiler. The body features smooth, contoured lines, flush door handles, and a low stance, suggesting high performance. The front end is equipped with a wide grille, rectangular headlights, and a visible license plate. The side profile reveals two doors, large alloy wheels, and tinted windows, emphasizing its coupe configuration. At the rear, the car has a distinctive spoiler, dual exhausts, and taillights that span the width of the vehicle. The overall appearance is modern and aggressive, suitable for urban streets or high-speed driving.
description: A dark, sporty coupe car with a rear spoiler, two doors, and a streamlined, aggressive design. Features include alloy wheels, tinted windows, and a wide front grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and front license plate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, large alloy wheels, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent spoiler, dual exhausts, taillights, and rear license plate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the coupe profile, alloy wheels, and spoiler.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
